messages.content: You are a specialized Graph-to-CV generator. Map the Raw Profile to the Target JSON Schema. Do NOT hallucinate skills or experiences not present in the input graph.

Target Length: <max_pages: 2>

Job Description:
Looking for a skilled professional with strong technical background, problem-solving skills, and relevant domain experience.

Raw Profile:
{"name": "unknown", "gender": "", "nationality": "", "date_of_birth": "", "drivers_licence": "", "short_description": "", "long_description": "", "email": "", "phone_mobile": "", "phone_home": "", "phone_work": "", "jobs": [], "education": [], "courses": [], "patents": [], "projects": [], "skills": [], "languages": [], "target": null, "address": null, "websites": [], "instant_messaging": [], "honors": [], "publications": [], "references": [], "other_info": []}

{"name": "unknown", "contact": {"phone": "", "email": ""}, "address": {"city": "", "country": ""}, "websites": [], "summary": "Dedicated professional with a strong technical foundation and a proven track record of applying analytical problem-solving skills to complex challenges. Committed to leveraging domain expertise to drive impactful results and optimize operational efficiencies.
